---
name: New Agent
about: Propose a new agent role definition
labels: agent
---

## What specialist role does this agent represent?

_What domain or job function does this agent own? Be specific — agents should have non-overlapping lanes._

## What real situation revealed this gap?

_Describe where the absence of this agent caused an existing agent to go outside its lane, or where no existing agent was the right fit._

## Proposed agent name

`agents/<name>-agent.md`

## Proposed lane boundaries

**Responsibilities (what this agent does):**

**Constraints (what this agent must NOT do):**

_Are there existing agents whose Constraints need to be updated to reflect this new agent's lane? If so, list them:_

## Which skills would this agent use?

_List the skill(s) from `skills/` this agent would reference in its "Skills You May Use" section. If new skills are needed, open a New Skill issue first._

## Which MCPs would this agent use?

_List the MCP(s) this agent needs context from._
